case_title: MI KYUNG KIM VS. DENIS WESLEY ALLARD

docket_entries.description: REMARK: RETURNED MAIL: REJECT NOTICE, REQUEST TO POSTPONE TRIAL AND CHECK IN THE AMOUNT OF $10.00 MAILED TO PLAINTIFF ON 11/16/18. PER U.S. POSTAL SERVICE, "RETURN TO SENDER - NO SUCH STREET - UNABLE TO FORWARD."
REMARK: RETURN MAIL - SMALL CLAIMS ORDER OF DISMISSAL - SENT TO PLAINTIF
REMARK:FILE DESTROYED PER ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE SAMUEL FENG ON 7/29/2022 PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 681.53.
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY KIM, MI KYUNG AS TO DEFENDANT ALLARD, DENIS WESLEY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-29-2018 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF MI KYUNG KIM. NO APPEARANCES BY DEFENDANT DENIS WESLEY ALLARD. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
ORDER CASE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.
